specifications.form_purpose: Vehicle dimensional data collection for lift sizing and compatibility determination

features: Comprehensive vehicle measurement form for lift compatibility
Three-column format for longest wheelbase, shortest wheelbase, and lowest clearance vehicles
Side view, front view, and rear view diagrams with dimension callouts
Captures tire dimensions, ground clearances, widths, and weights
notes: All dimensions to be entered in inches
Check box if lowest clearance is equal to longest or shortest wheel base
Note any areas that may cause problems in vehicle lifting
Determination in suiting lifting requirements is only as accurate and complete as the data received
